title: polypodium myriocarpum
intro: Polypodium myriocarpum, also known as the many-fruited polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polypodium myriocarpum include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in various folk remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
